title: pyrethrum lanuginosum
intro: Pyrethrum lanuginosum, also known as the woolly pyrethrum, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of South America and Australia. The plant's leaves and flowers contain a compound called pyrethrin, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties. The medicinal properties of pyrethrum lanuginosum have been shown to provide health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum lanuginosum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
